creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ mkdir ~/pkg_tmp
$ cd ~/pkg_tmp
$ rmdir ~/pkg_tmp
$ pwd
pwd: .: No such file or directory
$ pkg info
pkg: sqlite error while executing sqlite open in file pkgdb.c:1126: unable to open database file
$ pkg -v
1.10.1

I saw this message when I 'cd' into a directory which is owned by package "foo" (I don't remember which package but I think it's irrelevant) and some minutes later I wanted to remove "foo".
I think the error message is deceptive (I could handle the package database with sqlite and didn't understand why pkg can't access it).
